slides.title: Stress is *stalling your progress*.
slides.sub: You can eat clean and still feel stuck. Chronic stress quietly works against you.

slides.title: Cortisol holds water
slides.body: Stress raises *cortisol*, which makes you hold water and hides progress on the scale.

slides.title: Stress drives cravings
slides.body: High stress pushes you toward *sugar and salt* — your body chasing a quick hit.

slides.title: Stress wrecks sleep
slides.body: Stress and bad sleep *feed each other*, and both spike your hunger the next day.

slides.title: Walk it off
slides.body: A daily walk *lowers cortisol* better than scrolling. Movement is a release valve.

slides.title: Build in real rest
slides.body: *Genuine downtime* — not just less work — is what actually brings stress back down.

slides.title: Lower stress. *Unstick progress.*
slides.body: Vibe Health connects your sleep, steps & food to how you feel — so you can spot what stress is costing.

caption:
Eating clean but feeling stuck? Stress might be the missing variable. 😮‍💨

Cortisol holds water, fuels cravings, and wrecks sleep. Walk daily, build in real rest, and progress unsticks. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health connects your sleep, steps & food to how you feel → link in bio.
